summary.purpose: Route AI agents to the smallest correct source of truth before reading large generated files.
summary.rule: Use Host SDK for UI/multi-UI work; use backend RPC/OpenAPI for backend/API contracts.
summary.mcpStatus: Fleet Manager MCP provides local read-only documentation over stdio and authenticated, governed operations through POST /mcp on a running instance.

surfaces.useFor: RPC params, responses, permissions, generated OpenAPI, generated Host SDK contract.
surfaces.avoidFor: UI layout and template-specific convenience APIs.

surfaces.role: UI-facing source of truth for templates and alternate UIs.
surfaces.useFor: Multi-UI/template calls, typed frontend helpers, domain-level UI behavior.
Scalar docs, OpenAPI clients, future OpenAPI-backed MCP execution.
surfaces.avoidFor: Repo architecture, frontend call ownership, or internal plans.

surfaces.useFor: Read-only doc search and exact contract lookup.

resources.role: Small map of AI-readable docs and generated contracts.
resources.aiUse: Start here before reading large generated files.

resources.role: OpenAPI 3.1 contract for the backend RPC surface.
resources.aiUse: Use for exact params, responses, operation ids, and Scalar/MCP API tooling.

resources.role: Agent-facing method catalog: namespaceKind, descriptions, schemas, permissions, safety hints, recommended Host SDK wrappers.
resources.aiUse: Use get_api_method (MCP) for one method; read this file only for bulk analysis.

resources.role: Typed Host SDK method contract for template and multi-UI code.
resources.aiUse: Use when building UI/template calls so the UI depends on the host layer, not raw backend details.

resources.role: Host SDK public entrypoint exposed to templates and alternate UIs.
resources.aiUse: Use to discover the supported UI-facing domains and helpers.

resources.role: SDK-side per-method metadata: namespaceKind, risk flags, recommended wrapper, escape hatches.
resources.aiUse: Use in UI code via the HOST_METHOD_METADATA export to pick safe calls without leaving @host.

resources.role: Generated index of Host SDK modules, exports, and RPC bridge usage.
resources.aiUse: Use to find the right @host domain before touching UI/template code.

resources.role: Short AI/MCP entrypoint with Host SDK rules and common UI flows.
resources.aiUse: Use before UI, docs, or MCP work so agents follow the right contract layer.

resources.role: Fleet Manager deploy.sh install, update, environment, and flag guide.
resources.aiUse: Use for Fleet Manager install/deploy commands and deploy.sh parameters.

resources.role: Guide for BM template UIs and fully separate UIs using Fleet Manager.
resources.aiUse: Use before building a separate UI, BM template UI, or Host SDK adapter.

resources.role: Detailed deploy.sh architecture, topology, routing, SSL, and mode reference.
resources.aiUse: Use after the deployment guide when deploy behavior needs deeper explanation.

resources.role: Backend component and RPC inventory.
resources.aiUse: Use to find backend owners, permissions, source locations, and callable methods.

resources.role: HTTP route and middleware inventory.
resources.aiUse: Use to verify route shapes, auth middleware, and served static/API endpoints.

resources.role: WebSocket upgrade path and handler inventory.
resources.aiUse: Use to check WS paths, handlers, and payload caps.

resources.role: Backend event emission inventory.
resources.aiUse: Use when adding or wiring event contracts.

resources.role: Frontend calls into backend RPC/HTTP/direct device surfaces.
resources.aiUse: Use to find existing UI callers before changing a backend contract.

resources.role: Transport and authorization matrix.
resources.aiUse: Use to check public/admin/permission boundaries before exposing a surface.

resources.role: Entity type capability and action inventory.
resources.aiUse: Use to drive component/action UI without duplicating entity rules.

resources.role: Node-RED Admin API + Grafana API (proxied) with create/update/delete examples.
resources.aiUse: Use to provision Node-RED flows or Grafana dashboards via the FM proxy; live /api/docs/embedded-apps lists only enabled add-ons.

resources.role: Compares stable docs against generated backend inventories.
resources.aiUse: Use to detect stale handwritten docs.

resources.role: Docs folder convention and audience rules.
resources.aiUse: Use before creating or moving documentation.

mcpResources.role: Agent-facing method catalog with namespaceKind, safety hints, and Host SDK wrappers.
Typed Host SDK contract for multi-UI work.
Host SDK module/export lookup for multi-UI work.
Find UI callers before backend changes.
Node-RED + Grafana proxied API (create/update/delete flows and dashboards).
Future controlled API execution through OpenAPI/Scalar MCP.

mcpSearchResources.role: Separate UI and template Host SDK guide.

workflows.reason: The Host SDK is the stable UI-facing layer; raw backend RPC is lower level.
The deploy docs define deploy.sh commands, flags, environments, modes, and routing behavior.
Backend contract changes must preserve params, responses, and permission boundaries.
Caller lookup prevents breaking existing frontend flows.
Use read-only resources for context, then authenticated live tools for governed Fleet Manager operations.
